name: Protectores y retractores de heridas
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 6 corpus samples: coverage {'rango_diametro': 1.0, 'abordaje': 1.0}, illegal extractions 0.

attribute_defs.name: rango_diametro
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity: el rango de diametro circular (tallas estandar tipo Alexis XS-XL) es lo que fija la identidad clinica del protector/retractor; dominio cerrado con rangos observados mas tallas estandar.

attribute_defs.name: abordaje
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Descriptive: el abordaje (abdominal abierto vs laparoscopico) se normaliza pero el dispositivo Alexis es equivalente, no discrimina identidad dentro de la categoria.
